name: Mock Peach Daiquiri
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine peaches, lemon juice, ice cubes, milk, peach juice, and rum flavoring in a blender.
2. Blend until the ice is completely melted.
3. Serve immediately.
NOTE: Fresh peaches can be used. Add 1 tbsp granulated sugar or to taste.
MOCK STRAWBERRY DAIQUIRI: Use fresh strawberries instead of peaches. Add 1 tbsp granulated sugar or to taste.
